data.content: Implemented the Settings model-selector fix on branch b5c5-settings-model-pulldowns (commit 704c9e17569e). Added static scan catalogs for Claude/Codex/Gemini so pulldowns always list real model rows, updated scanned Settings selection to toggle/remove registered model options, and added clear affordances on selected pills with provider-prefix stripping so pills show model names like Opus 4.6. Validation in /Users/cartine/foolery-b5c5: bun run lint (passes with one pre-existing warning in src/components/beat-form.tsx), bunx tsc --noEmit, bun run test, bun run build.
